concerns.detail: Inserted multiple profane personal attacks and insults including '你自己吃屎' (you eat shit), '煞笔老板' (stupid/moron boss), and '死个🐴' (die mother) directed at other editors or professors

concerns.detail: Deleted substantive observation about an advisor breaking a prior promise to allow a student to follow them to a new institution for PhD studies
concerns.excerpt: 跳槽的时候跟有个学生说好的可以跟过去读phd后面毁约了
